description: Diagnostic-only timing canary manifest for private cross-root flushSync and warning-boundary root-output rows; public comparable timing remains blocked until public compatibility gates are green.

acceptedGate.notes: Worker 410 proves the flush-sync-cross-root-render private host-output diagnostic rows across probe modes using the private flushSync guard, fake-DOM host output, and Rust cross-root sync-flush diagnostics while public flushSync and public root compatibility remain blocked.

Worker 411 proves the development-warning-boundaries private warning-boundary diagnostic rows across probe modes using root record metadata and duplicate createRoot marker checks; console output and public warning compatibility remain blocked.
The public root render E2E gate still admits 0 public scenario-mode rows, so private cross-root flushSync and warning-boundary timing canaries cannot become public comparable timing evidence.
The public facade gate keeps root rendering, public flushSync, development warning console compatibility, browser DOM mutation, and compatibility claims blocked despite private diagnostics.

milestones.description: Private cross-root flushSync and warning-boundary timing canaries may collect diagnostic timing for the admitted private rows only.
milestones.blockedReason: Private cross-root flushSync and warning-boundary timing canaries are admitted only for diagnostic private timing; public React DOM root compatibility, public warning compatibility, and comparable timing remain blocked.

milestones.description: Public comparable timing promotion remains blocked until public root render, public facade, public flushSync, and public warning gates become green.
milestones.blockedReason: Comparable public timing remains blocked until public root render E2E and public facade gates are green-admitted and claim compatibility; private cross-root flushSync and warning-boundary timing canaries do not satisfy public behavior.

scenarios.area: react-dom private cross-root flushSync timing canary
scenarios.blockedReason: The cross-root flushSync timing canary covers only private fake-DOM host output and Rust sync-flush diagnostics; public flushSync, public root compatibility, browser DOM mutation, and comparable timing remain blocked.

The warning-boundary timing canary covers only private root record metadata and duplicate createRoot marker diagnostics; console output, public warning compatibility, public root behavior, and comparable timing remain blocked.
